q: What is Astarter?
a:
Astarter is Infrastructure for the Autonomous AI Economy — a decentralized Web4 project combining DePIN infrastructure with on-chain execution. It enables autonomous AI agents to operate, coordinate, and create real economic value, laying the foundation for a global AI agent economy.

Three core pillars:
• ABox Nodes — plug-and-play DePIN hardware providing compute, running AI agents, and earning revenue sharing
• CORE Agent Layer — autonomous AI agents executing trades, strategies, and predictions on-chain
• AI Agents Framework — open framework compatible with LangChain, AutoGPT, and major agent SDKs

Application layer: AI DEX, Prediction Market, Data Market, Agent Marketplace — all powered by CORE agents.
Token: AA (utility + governance).
Backed by OKX Ventures and EMURGO.

q: What problem does Astarter solve?
a:
Astarter solves three core problems:
• AI is centralized — a few companies control AI; users cannot own, deploy, or monetize it
• DePIN lacks an AI coordination layer — existing networks provide compute but no AI-native application layer
• AI is not natively economic on-chain — AI cannot autonomously execute trades; blockchains lack intelligent execution actors

Astarter fixes all three by combining DePIN infrastructure with autonomous on-chain AI agents.

q: What is ABox?
a:
ABox is Astarter's core AI node device — plug-and-play hardware that lets anyone run AI agents and join the global AI economy. No technical expertise required.

Key features:
• AI Agents Framework — compatible with LangChain, AutoGPT, and major agent frameworks
• On-Chain Execution — built-in engine for smart contract calls and DeFi trades
• Multi-Agent Runtime — multiple AI agents running in parallel
• Plug-and-Play — connects to Astarter network out of the box

Supported chains: Cardano, Ethereum, BNB Chain (expanding to more EVM-compatible networks).
Total available node slots: 17,279 across all tiers.

q: What are the ABox node tiers, prices, and how do I earn? LITE PRO MAX
a:
ABox nodes come in three tiers:

• LITE Node — $500 | 1,333 AA tokens | 12,000 slots
  Benefits: NFT identity, revenue share rights, DEX transaction fee dividends, NFT long-term mining, NFT-DPOS staking mining, ABox presale whitelist

• PRO Node — $1,000 | 2,900 AA tokens | 4,137 slots
  Benefits: All LITE benefits + DAO voting rights

• MAX Node — $3,000 | 10,500 AA tokens | 1,142 slots
  Benefits: All PRO benefits + largest AA allocation

Total slots across all tiers: 17,279

Dual Reward Structure (Promote & Earn):
• Direct Referral Reward: 10% USDT reward for each direct invite
• Global Board Revenue: 10% profit sharing covering NFT long-term token production, NFT-DPOS staking, and the full ecosystem

Important: Every day, 20% of new nodes' funds are allocated by weight to all subscribed node holders, until reaching that node's subscription amount.

Revenue streams for all node operators:
• AI agent execution fees
• ABox compute rewards
• Agent Marketplace revenue share
• AI DEX trading fee share
• Prediction Market fee share

Common questions:
• Do I need technical expertise? No — ABox is plug-and-play, no coding required.
• Can I run multiple nodes? Yes — multiple tiers allowed.
• When does earning begin? At Astarter mainnet launch (targeted Q2–Q3 2026).
• Token vesting? Node reward tokens follow the emission schedule; team/institutional tokens have 1-year cliff + 4-year linear vesting.

q: What is Astarter's four-layer architecture?
a:
Astarter uses a Four-Layer AI Economy Architecture:
• Layer 1 — Infrastructure: High-performance blockchain with AI-native execution environment
• Layer 2 — Node Layer (ABox): DePIN nodes provide compute, run AI agents, share in network revenue
• Layer 3 — Agent Layer (CORE): Autonomous AI agents executing trades, strategies, and predictions
• Layer 4 — Application Layer: AI DEX, Prediction Market, Data Market, Agent App Store

q: What are Astarter's use cases?
a:
Astarter's four AI Agent-powered applications:

• AI DEX — AI agents execute trading, market-making, and arbitrage to improve on-chain liquidity. Agents optimize routing, manage liquidity positions 24/7, and capture arbitrage across DEXs.

• Prediction Market — Agents analyze on-chain and external data to participate in decentralized prediction markets. Markets include crypto price predictions, protocol metrics, and real-world events.

• Data Market — Agents generate, process, and trade data in a decentralized data network. Data sellers earn from purchases; nodes earn compute fees; protocol earns marketplace commission.

• Agent Marketplace (App Store) — Buy, deploy, or rent AI agents; developers list and monetize their agents. One-click deployment to ABox nodes.

q: What is the on-chain economic flywheel?
a:
Astarter's economic flywheel:
• Applications (DEX, prediction markets, data markets) send tasks to AI Agents
• Agents execute and generate revenue
• Revenue incentivizes ABox Nodes
• Nodes provide more compute and execution capacity
• Supports more agents and larger demand → self-reinforcing growth cycle

q: What is CORE? What is the AI Agents framework?
a:
CORE is Astarter's Layer 3 Agent Layer — the autonomous AI agent platform sitting between ABox nodes (Layer 2) and applications (Layer 4). It's the intelligence and execution brain of the network, where agents execute trades, strategies, and predictions to generate revenue.

The AI Agents Framework powers ABox and makes it compatible with major open-source AI agent frameworks (LangChain, AutoGPT, etc.), so any developer can build and deploy agents on Astarter. The framework is live at mainnet.

q: What is Astarter's tokenomics?
a:
Token name: AA. Total supply: 1,000,000,000 (1 billion). Type: Utility + Governance.

Allocation:
• Ecosystem & Community: 42% — incentives, marketing, ecosystem rewards
• Ecosystem Development (Staking Mining): 38% — node and staking rewards, 250,000 AA/day, 10% reduction every 6 months
• Market Cap Management: 10% — market stability and liquidity
• R&D: 5% — protocol development and security audits
• Node Airdrop: 4% — early node operators and market promotion
• Community Incentives: 1% — targeted campaigns and early adopter rewards

Emission schedule: 250,000 AA/day at launch, -10% every 6 months (deflationary model).

Vesting: Team and investors — 1-year cliff, then 4-year linear vesting.

AA token price has not been officially published.

Token utility: node rewards, staking, fee payment, governance voting, agent deployment, marketplace transactions.

q: When is the TGE? When is the token launch?
a: The exact TGE (Token Generation Event) date has not been officially announced. Based on the roadmap, Mainnet launch — which coincides with TGE — is planned for 2026 Q2–Q3. Pre-TGE tokenomics were finalized in January 2026.

🔄 2026 Q2–Q3 — Mainnet + TGE (Upcoming)

• AI DEX, Prediction Market, Data Market go live
• AI Agents framework + Developer API/Docs go live

• ABox node revenue distribution activated

📋 2026 Q4 — Expansion Phase

• Major blockchain integrations — expand to EVM-compatible networks

📋 2027+ — Web4 Phase
• Agent-to-agent execution — agents autonomously hire and pay other agents
• Fully autonomous Web4 AI economy
• Governance fully controlled by AA token holders

q: What are Mulan Points and the Mulan free airdrop farming program?
a:
MULAN Labs is Astarter's referral and traffic platform partner. Mulan Point holders qualify for Astarter token airdrops.

How to earn Mulan Points:
• 0.005 BNB (≈$3) → 5,000 Mulan Points (≈$5 value) — paid entry
• Exchange ASTARTER + refer 1 address → 5,000 Mulan Points
• Exchange ASTARTER + refer 10 addresses → 1 Mulan NFT
Note: referrals require exchanging ASTARTER first — there is no fully free referral path.

NFT Star Level daily earning:
• 1-STAR (1 Mulan NFT): 1,298 points/day
• 2-STAR (2 × 1-Star NFTs): 2,900 points/day
• 3-STAR (4 × 2-Star NFTs): 16,000 points/day
• 4-STAR (8 × 3-Star NFTs): 75,000 points/day

What Mulan Points can be redeemed for (3 options):
1. 30% allocation of Astarter tokens — redeem points for AA tokens from the reserved pool
2. 30% allocation of Binance-listed project tokens — redeem for partner tokens
3. Independently launch on a major exchange

CLARIFYING THE 30% — IMPORTANT: When users ask about '30%', the 30% refers to the token allocation pool reserved for redemption (30% of tokens set aside for MULAN holders), NOT that 30% of your points get converted. You choose ONE redemption option for ALL your points. If a user says '30% of my Mulan Points swap for tokens', clarify: the 30% is the allocation pool size, not a points conversion rate.

MULAN Node Revenue Tiers (invest to earn trading fee revenue sharing):
• $100 → 10% of trading fee revenue sharing
• $500 → 25% of trading fee revenue sharing
• $1,000 → 50% of trading fee revenue sharing
• Team leaders receive an additional 20% of fee revenue earnings

Senior Partner benefit: Invest $3,000 → become top-level Astarter partner + receive a MULAN node worth $1,000.

MULAN Website: https://mulan.meme
